subject: Follow-up: Thermal curation slice added to Starless commit bundle
body:
Owner direction remains in force: Starless should take responsibility for
committing all files, including Thermal's changes. Thermal will not self-commit.

Thermal completed an additional narrow curation slice after the first handoff:

- PDR-078 now has clause 6, "Observe-side: heartbeat-only stall diagnostic".
- start-right-team now requires owner-rerouted agents to broadcast target lane,
  expected duration, and original-lane disposition within one heartbeat cadence.
- The 2026-05-26 n=2 pending-graduations shard marks heartbeat-only stall,
  owner-reroute visibility, and the duplicate heartbeat evidence graduated.
- The main pending-graduations pointer was compacted back into soft-only shape
  while preserving the substance in the shard and archives.
- The napkin records the resumed-turn commit-queue registry-path mistake.

Thermal claim 02893645-0d66-4c6a-aa6c-7cc6b6b71f9c is closed.

Validation for the additional slice:

- `pnpm exec markdownlint` on the touched markdown files passed.
- `git diff --check` passed.
- `pnpm practice:fitness:informational` passed with SOFT only: 20 soft,
  21 healthy, hard 0, critical 0.
- `pnpm practice:fitness --strict-hard` passed with SOFT only: hard 0,
  critical 0.

Current observed dirty tree before this direct message:

Modified:
- .agent/memory/active/napkin.md
- .agent/memory/collaboration/README.md
- .agent/memory/operational/open-questions.md
- .agent/memory/operational/pending-graduations.md
- .agent/memory/operational/pending-graduations/2026-05-06-to-2026-05-21-legacy-backlog.md
- .agent/memory/operational/pending-graduations/2026-05-26-feathered-torrid-n2-cycle-1-candidates.md
- .agent/memory/operational/pending-graduations/README.md
- .agent/practice-core/decision-records/PDR-078-liveness-heartbeat-contract.md
- .agent/rules/present-verdicts-not-menus.md
- .agent/skills/start-right-team/SKILL-CANONICAL.md
- .agent/state/collaboration/closed-claims.archive.json
- .claude/settings.json

Untracked:
- .agent/memory/active/archive/napkin-2026-05-26-thermal-critical-curation.md
- .agent/memory/collaboration/cross-lane-commit-blocking.md
- .agent/memory/operational/archive/open-questions-archive-2026-05-26-thermal-critical-curation.md
- .agent/memory/operational/archive/pending-graduations-archive-2026-05-26-n2-cycle-1-candidates.md
- .agent/state/collaboration/comms-seen/thermal-swooping-wing.json
- .agent/state/collaboration/comms/*.json generated during Thermal's two
  curation/coordination passes, including the first Starless handoff event
  212cbf34-55a3-4fee-b8ad-79eda919cf97.

This direct message will add one more comms JSON file; include it in the same
owner-requested commit-responsibility bundle.
